data.title: XRP Spot ETFs See Significant Inflows on January 15
data.description: According to PANews, data from SoSoValue indicates that on January 15 (Eastern Time), XRP spot ETFs experienced a total net inflow of $17.06 million. The Grayscale XRP ETF GXRP led with a single-day net inflow of $7.2 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $287 million. Following closely, the Bitwise XRP ETF XRP recorded a single-day net inflow of $7.16 million, with a historical total net inflow reaching $310 million. As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of XRP spot ETFs stands at $1.51 billion, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.21% and a cumulative historical net inflow of $1.27 billion.

data.title: Banking GOP Bill Pulled, But Path Forward Remains
data.description: Nearly 24 hours after the GOP-led markup on the Senate Banking Committee’s bill was pulled, industry insiders, lawmakers, and staffers are still processing the fallout—and many remain frustrated by the process, according to Eleanor Terrett (@EleanorTerrett).Sources tell Terrett that hope remains for the legislation if banks, Coinbase, and Democratic lawmakers can reach a deal on yield in the coming days. “All is not lost,” said one insider.The contentious tokenized securities provision, Section 505, now appears less of a roadblock. Tokenization firms suggest the language Coinbase objected to was taken out of context, while stakeholders—including Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong—say a significant amendment or removal of the section is possible.Ethics concerns remain unchanged, and talks between the White House and Senate are ongoing.Questions also persist about whether the Banking Committee’s shifted markup will affect the Agriculture Committee’s timeline. Sources tell Terrett the order may not matter: if Agriculture secures a bipartisan deal, it could ease the Senate Banking process. This mirrors last summer’s House experience, when the Agriculture Committee passed its portion of the Clarity Act 47-6, encouraging the Financial Services Committee to move forward even with less Democratic support.As negotiations continue, both the industry and Congress are watching closely to see if a compromise emerges to revive the bill.

data.title: Japanese Central Bank May Consider Early Interest Rate Hike Amid Yen Depreciation
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, some policymakers at the Bank of Japan are contemplating an earlier-than-expected interest rate hike, potentially as soon as April, due to the ongoing depreciation of the yen which could exacerbate inflation pressures. The policymakers face the challenging task of increasing borrowing costs that have been low for years, amidst global economic headwinds, while Japan's economy is just beginning to recover from prolonged deflation.

The central bank raised rates to a thirty-year high in December and is expected to maintain them at the upcoming January meeting. However, insiders suggest that many policymakers see room for further hikes, with some not ruling out action in April, which would be earlier than the market's expectation of a rate increase in the latter half of the year. Sources indicate that if sufficient evidence emerges showing Japan can consistently achieve its 2% inflation target, some within the Bank of Japan may consider acting sooner.

data.title: Sources say that some within the Bank of Japan believe that an interest rate hike may occur sooner than the market expects.
data.description: Sources say some within the Bank of Japan believe that an interest rate hike may come sooner than the market expects. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trader pension-usdt.eth switched his position to a long Bitcoin order, going long 1000 BTC with 3x leverage.
data.description: According to OnchainLens monitoring, after closing out his ETH long position with a profit of $739,400, trader "pension-usdt.eth" has now opened a BTC long position with 3x leverage, totaling 1,000 BTC, worth approximately $95 million. The opening price was $95,614.5, and the liquidation price was $60,578.1.

data.title: Spot Silver Experiences Significant Daily Decline

data.title: Solana's Head of Growth for Asia Pacific: Arrogant Performance by Starknet Executives Led to His Decision to Join Solana
data.description: Yaoyao, Solana's Head of Growth for Asia Pacific, posted on the X platform that before joining Solana, she attended a Starknet event in 2023 and attempted to discuss expansion plans for the Asia Pacific region with the team. During a conversation with a Starknet executive, the executive was arrogant and described Yaoyao's inquiries about her reasons for joining the company and how she did so as extremely rude. Yaoyao stated that at the time, she was working at Bybit and was also interviewing with Solana, and this experience ultimately led her to join Solana. Yaoyao also emphasized that ecosystems are defined by people, and without standing with the community, there will be no support.

data.title: A whale used maximum leverage to short $60.32 million worth of ETH and $1.27 million worth of XMR on Hyperliquid.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, an address deposited 3 million USDC into Hyperliquid and used maximum leverage to short 18,261 ETH (worth $60.32 million) and 1,845 XMR (worth $1.27 million). The liquidation price for this address's ETH position was $3,380.

data.title: Moldova Plans to Introduce Cryptocurrency Regulations by 2026
data.description: According to PANews, Moldova's Finance Minister Andrian Gavriliță has announced plans to implement cryptocurrency regulations by 2026. As a candidate for European Union membership, Moldova is required to adhere to the EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) regulatory framework. The forthcoming regulations will clarify the legality of holding, trading, and converting cryptocurrencies for citizens and authorize specific institutions to conduct related activities. However, cryptocurrencies will not be permitted for payments of goods or services. While holding cryptocurrencies will not be taxed, profits from transactions will incur a 12% income tax. The regulations will also include stringent anti-money laundering and security risk management measures. Gavriliță emphasized that the government's aim is to legalize the sector while preventing the use of cryptocurrencies for illegal financing and money laundering activities.

data.title: Whale Invests $10 Million in Bitcoin Options, Anticipates $100,000 Price Target
data.description: According to PANews, a significant investor has made a substantial bet on Bitcoin's future price increase by purchasing options worth $353 million. The investor acquired 1,300 call options set to expire on February 27, 2026, with a strike price of $100,000, and 2,400 call options expiring on January 30, 2026, with a strike price of $98,000. The total premium paid for these options amounted to $10.22 million. While it is unclear if these transactions were made by the same individual, the timing of the purchases was notably close.

data.title: USD/JPY Experiences Slight Decline
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the USD/JPY exchange rate has experienced a minor short-term decrease of 20 points, currently reported at 158.44.

data.title: Ripple-Backed Evernorth Plans Nasdaq Listing via SPAC Merger
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, Evernorth, an entity supported by Ripple, is preparing to go public on Nasdaq through a SPAC merger, with the trading symbol XRPN. The company currently holds 388 million XRP tokens.

CEO Asheesh Birla stated, "The timing couldn't be more perfect, with the right regulatory environment, government support, and institutions ready to adopt." Despite a recent decline in valuations for crypto reserve companies, and many ceasing to purchase cryptocurrencies, Birla emphasized that Evernorth not only offers exposure to XRP but also manages custody, compliance, and security obligations.

data.title: A whale paid a premium of $10.22 million to purchase BTC call options worth $353 million.
data.description: According to AI's monitoring, today a whale address purchased 1,300 BTC call options expiring on February 27, 2026, with a strike price of $100,000, and 2,400 BTC call options expiring on January 30, 2026, with a strike price of $98,000. This address paid a total premium of $10.22 million, with a notional value of $353 million. Its leverage ratio was 35x.

data.title: BitMine Projects Significant Revenue from Ethereum Holdings
data.description:
According to PANews, BitMine Chairman Thomas Lee announced during a shareholder meeting on Thursday that the company anticipates generating over $400 million in annual pre-tax revenue from its $13 billion Ethereum assets. The majority of this income is expected to come from staking these holdings. Lee mentioned that the company potentially saved $400 million in its recent Ethereum acquisitions. However, since beginning its Ethereum purchases in July last year, BitMine is currently facing an unrealized loss of approximately $2.3 billion.

Lee also discussed the company's $200 million investment in Beast Industries, owned by YouTuber MrBeast, describing it as a 'no-brainer' decision with the potential for a tenfold return. He emphasized that MrBeast is an iconic content creator of this generation, and the partnership could help connect Ethereum with a younger audience.

data.title: Meta's Conversions API Gateway Vulnerabilities Exposed
data.description: 23pds posted on X. Security researcher Samm0uda has identified significant vulnerabilities in Meta's Conversions API Gateway, revealing stored and reflected XSS vulnerabilities valued at $312,500. These vulnerabilities allowed JavaScript code execution, posing potential risks to user data and privacy. The discovery highlights ongoing security challenges faced by major tech companies in safeguarding their platforms against cyber threats. Meta has been informed of these issues and is expected to address them promptly to ensure the safety and integrity of its services.

data.title: X Product Head: “We Don’t Want” Millions in Enterprise API Revenue From InfoFi Apps
data.description: According to Odaily, X Head of Product Nikita Bier said in a post on X that InfoFi applications were already paying the platform millions of dollars for Enterprise API access, but “we don’t want it.”Previously, X revoked API access for InfoFi applications, as such apps were generating large volumes of AI-generated spam content and spam replies on the platform.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 3,300 USDT with a 0.94% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 16, 2026, 02:08 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 3,300 USDT and is now trading at 3,299.550049 USDT, with a narrowed 0.94% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: The crypto sector fell for the second consecutive day, with the DePIN sector leading the decline, falling by more than 4%.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the crypto market sector has declined for two consecutive days, with the DePIN sector leading the decline at 4.22% in the past 24 hours. Within the sector, Filecoin (FIL) fell 8.55%, and Golem (GLM) fell 10.07%. Additionally, Bitcoin (BTC) fell 0.74%, dropping below $95,000, while Ethereum (ETH) remained relatively resilient, declining 0.21% and still hovering around $3,300. In other sectors, the CeFi sector fell 0.37% in the last 24 hours, but NEXO (NEXO) rose 1.13%; the Layer 1 sector fell 1.32%, while TRON (TRX) rose 2.30% intraday; the PayFi sector fell 2.11%, while Dash (DASH) bucked the trend and rose 3.50%; the Layer 2 sector fell 2.52%, while Mantle (MNT) rose 0.99%; the DeFi sector fell 2.59%, while River (RIVER) still rose significantly by 8.12%; the Meme sector fell 2.93%, while MemeCore (M) rose 1.65%. Crypto sector indices reflecting historical sector performance show that the ssiGameFi, ssiDePIN, and ssiSocialFi indices fell 4.53%, 4.26%, and 3.20%, respectively.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Card Transactions Surpass $15 Billion Monthly
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, blockchain analytics firm Artemis reports that monthly transactions using cryptocurrency cards have exceeded $15 billion. In contrast, peer-to-peer (P2P) stablecoin transfers reach approximately $11 billion monthly.

Cryptocurrency cards are a significant driver of on-chain stablecoin activity. Visa accounts for over 80% of the stablecoin card transactions tracked in the report. Mastercard holds a smaller share but is experiencing growth, while regional card projects contribute minimally.

data.title: Product Manager X: InfoFi apps have paid millions of dollars for API access, but the platform no longer needs that revenue.
data.description: Nikita Bier, product manager at X, posted on the X platform that the InfoFi app paid millions of dollars for API access, but the platform no longer needs that revenue. This comes after X revoked InfoFi's API access, as such apps were causing a surge in AI spam and spam replies on the platform.
